## Description
This project is a landing page for an AI-powered educational platform called "Tawjihi AI", designed to help high school students understand mathematics through interactive AI explanations.

The website is a working production deployment hosted on Replit.

## Preview
![Website Preview](https://your-screenshot-link.png)

## Purpose
This project demonstrates a software-based web application (AI educational platform).
